case_title: HANH NGUYEN VS. NEW ALPHA THREE INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-08-2024 BY CURTIS KARNOW. PLAINTIFF HANH NGUYEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NEW ALPHA THREE INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CURTIS KARNOW; CLERK: D. LEMIRE. NOT REPORTED.(D611)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,948.08 FILED BY NGUYEN, HANH AS TO DEFENDANT NEW ALPHA THREE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 611

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, HANH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW ALPHA THREE INC. $9,948.08 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,073.08 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE JANAN BARANCE] FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, HANH AS TO DEFENDANT NEW ALPHA THREE INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-16-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEW ALPHA THREE INC.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO KRISTINA LANGNER
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED RETURNED WITHOUT ORIGINAL SUBPOENA. SERVICE FEE $50.
